meta.title: Credica — Your Digital Business Card & Network Wallet
meta.description: One app for business cards, networking, and social connections. Scan to exchange, group swap in one tap, auto-update when you change jobs.

hero.title: Your
hero.sub:
One app for business cards, networking & social.
Scan to exchange, group swap in one tap,
auto-update when you change jobs — always the latest you.

screen.subtitle: 3 follow-up suggestions today
screen.auto_bidirectional_desc: Your card was sent to the other party automatically

group.label: Group Exchange Mode
group.title: Highlight
group.name: EMBA Class 114 Reunion
group.desc:
Group Card Exchange
Scan Once, Get All
group.detail: Seminars, dinners, class events — no need to scan one by one. Create a group, everyone exchanges cards simultaneously.
group.result_sub: Everyone received each other's digital card
group.bullet1: Create a group, members scan to join
group.bullet2: All cards sync with each other

update.label: Always Up-to-Date
update.title:
Changed jobs?
Cards
update.desc: Paper cards go stale the moment they're printed. With Credica, once you update your info, everyone who has your card gets the latest version automatically.
update.bullet1: Title, company, contact info sync instantly
update.bullet2: Recipients see updates without any action

features.label: Core Features
features.title: 100x Better Than Paper Cards
features.card1_desc: A card that's always current. Title changed? Updated instantly. Includes QR Code for online and offline exchange.
features.card2_desc: Every exchange auto-records time and occasion. Sort, search, track — your network never collects dust.
features.card3_desc: Not just a card — backed by W3C standard digital signatures. They know you're really you, not a fake account.

scenes.label: Use Cases
scenes.title: Every Social Encounter, More Efficient
scenes.tile1_desc:
Group swap, scan once
Works for hundreds of people
scenes.tile2_desc:
No digging for paper cards
One scan, naturally connected
scenes.tile3_desc:
Post-graduation network stays fresh
Always in the loop
scenes.tile4_desc:
Language barriers? No problem
Digital cards cross borders

privacy.label: Privacy & Security
privacy.title: Your Network Data, Under Your Control
privacy.desc: We don't sell your data or track your behavior. You can delete your account and take all your data anytime.

v2.title: For Enterprises? Coming Soon
v2.desc: Next phase: enterprise credential issuance, training certificate management, access control integration, and compliance analytics dashboard — bringing verifiable trust to organizations.
